steps: Dissect the third instar larvae in 0 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 at room temperature.

Bath in 1 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution for 5-10 min before the recording. 00:10:00 The mean value of resistance of recording electrode is ~ 40 MΩ when the electrode is filled with a 3M KCl solution. All recordings were obtained from muscle 6 of abdominal segment 3. One larva was only used for one recording.
Use recordings from the muscles that hold resting membrane potentials at < - 60 mV for further data quantifications.
Evoke EJPs by stimulating axonal bundle via a glass capillary electrode with an internal diameter of ~10-15 mm (Harvard apparatus Glass Capillaries GC120F-15) at 0.2 Hz.
Fix stimulus pulses at 0.5 ms duration (pClamp 10.6 software, Axon Instruments Inc).

Apply 3-5 mV electric stimuli to obtain maximal EJP amplitude. EJPs were amplified with an Axoclamp 900A amplifier (Axon Instruments, Foster City, CA) under bridge mode, filtered at 10 kHz. EJPs were analyzed by pClamp 10.6 software (Axon Instruments). For the EJP amplitude at 0.2 Hz, the mean of the EJP amplitude was averaged from the amplitudes of 80 EJPs in one consecutive recording.
creator: Chi-Kuang Yao
